text_block_list.text:
One day, not long before Seiun Sky's debut
race...

text_block_list.name: Spe and Grass
text_block_list.text:
Haaah!
Hup!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... One more time, Grass!

It's Special Week, a racer with incredible speed
whose goal is to become the best in Japan.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I was hoping you'd say that.

And that's Grass Wonder. Despite her serene
exterior, she's an Umamusume with incredible
drive.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Whooooa! You two are on fire! Let me and King
join in, por favor!

There's El Condor Pasa too. In her recent debut
race, she showed what it means to strive to be the
world's strongest Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Perfect! I'll give you a look at my first-rate ability!

And finally, King Halo—a privileged Umamusume
born into a respected family. Many already
expect great things from her.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're Sky's trainer, correct? I'll grant you the
right to record our times!

So how did I wind up being responsible for
everyone but Seiun Sky's training? We'll have to
backtrack to a few moments earlier...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Sei! Heeey!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh. You're finally here... But why are you in your uniform?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I have a meeting with my trainer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pardon?! What about our group training plans?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Group training? What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You don't remember me inviting you yesterday
afternoon to run together?!

We couldn't ask for a better opportunity.
Everyone here is newly acclaimed after having
just finished their debut races.

Having started at the same time as Seiun Sky,
these racers are all bound to become rivals
standing in her path. I want all the information on
them I can get, but...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Now that you mention it, maybe you did
say something about running together.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So you do remember! Is everything just a big joke
to you?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Now now, King, we knew Sei was going to come
along. That's why we waited.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: She would never miss this chance to gather intel on us. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Heh, you think too highly of me. I really didn't
remember until just now.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear... So you came all the way here just to
meet with your trainer?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Are we gonna be doing something unusual for
our match?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa! We're getting derailed here! Quick,
just go and get changed, Sei!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And while you're doin' that, would your trainer
mind lendin' us a little hand?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Fine. In that case, you better keep your eyes
glued on the action, Trainer.

So, I end up watching Special Week and the
others train. Afterwards...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: They're all incredible!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Is what you're thinking, right? I can see it on
your face.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
At least I can rest assured knowing you paid close
attention to them.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Then you must've noticed how strong they really
are, yeah?

Seiun Sky watches Special Week out of the corner
of her eye. A grave look spreads across her face.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So what did you think, Trainer? Let's start with
Spe—

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Sei! Now that you've changed, come join us!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But be warned... I won't allow any of you to pass
me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ehe, you really won't let me off the hook, will ya?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: All right, Trainer, keep your eyes peeled.

After she and the others train together for a
while...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: King and El said they need a few more minutes!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
King really takes forever to get ready. I saw El
helping her out.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, we are classmates.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I almost forgot! Thank you for today, Sei's trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Not only did you help with training, but you even
got Sei to join in!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You're just happy you got to hang out with a
bunch of cute Umamusume! ☆

She cut me off to say something completely
ridiculous.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
We won't have many opportunities to get
together like this once Sei debuts.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
These occasions will only come when our separate
paths finally cross.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You're right! We'll finally get our chance to run
against each other during the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You all may be really skilled... but I'm not gonna
lose the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's your dream, right? To be the best
Umamusume in Japan?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I'm gonna win the Derby and become the
best for my moms!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you're so straightforward and honest.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What about you, Grass? What are you running
for?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
...I have only one reason—to reach the top of my
path as a racer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: That's what I'm striving for.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
C'mon! Go easy on meee! How am I supposed to
compete with all that!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm seriouuus! What chance do I have against all
these super talented runners and their sparkly
dreams?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta be the unluckiest Umamusume in the
world, being born into this generation...

Certainly, the others do pose some serious
competition. However, Seiun Sky can't really
believe what she's saying right now, does she?
choice_data_list: I think it's actually a blessing.
I think it's actually a blessing.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, reeeally? You sound sure of yourself.
choice_data_list:
Isn't it more fun when the fish you're trying to
reel in puts up a fight?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Trainer, you're smart as a whip.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But don't you realize I just wanna take it easy?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I guess if you're gonna be that enthused, then I'll
have to go tango with my classmates. ♪
